# frostmoln_ssh_key (Resource)

Manages an SSH key in the NordicLight platform.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "frostmoln_ssh_key" "example" {
  name       = "my-ssh-key"
  public_key = file("~/.ssh/id_ed25519.pub")
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the SSH key.
- `public_key` (String) The public key content.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) The timestamp when the SSH key was created.
- `fingerprint` (String) The fingerprint of the SSH key.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the SSH key.
